questions.question: On a one-page summary, where should the headline KPI (e.g. net sales) go?
questions.explanation: Readers start top-left. Put the single most important number there, big and formatted.

questions.question: Which conditional-formatting option instantly flags repeated customer names?
questions.explanation: Duplicate Values highlights repeats — a fast second check after Stage 1's Remove Duplicates.

questions.question: To turn a Category × Area grid into a heat map, you use…
questions.explanation: Color Scales shade cells by value, making the grid readable at a glance.

questions.question: You want every Return line's whole row to turn red. Which rule?
options: New Rule → Use a formula → =$C2="Return" → red fill
Data Bars on the InvoiceType column
questions.explanation: A formula rule referencing the locked InvoiceType column ($C2) applies the format to the entire row.

questions.question: Which custom number format shows 1250000 as "AED 1,250,000"?
questions.explanation: Quoted text in a number format prints literally; #,##0 adds thousands separators with no decimals.

questions.question: In the capstone, why prefer a live formula (e.g. SUMIFS) over typing the number off a pivot?
options: The answer stays correct if the data changes or is refreshed
questions.explanation: A live formula recalculates when the data updates; a hard-typed number silently goes stale.
